_meta.purpose: Hub-page FAQ stems from spec §4 question 8. Ryan writes the answers — 50 to 120 words each, factual, named entities, no fluff. Each answer should stand on its own as if quoted by an AI engine.
_meta.voice_rules: Lead with the answer, then the explanation. Specific numbers (e.g. 'priced from $2.4M'), date-stamped claims (e.g. 'As of November 2025…'), no marketing adjectives like 'stunning' or 'exquisite'. Per spec §12 AEO content style rules.
